title: AIEOS capability contract (meta-schema)
description: Every capability contract under contracts/<namespace>.<action>.contract.yaml validates against this meta-schema. A contract declares which taxonomy action it satisfies, the shape of the inputs the adapter receives, the findings schema it emits (or null for non-findings actions), the evidence artifacts it produces, and the conformance suite that tests it.

action.description: Taxonomy action identifier — must match an entry in taxonomy/actions-v1.md exactly.

contract_version.description: Semantic version of this contract. Increments require a cutover announcement per the deprecation protocol.

required_inputs.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the structured inputs the adapter receives. The contract validator checks this fragment is itself a valid Draft 2020-12 schema.

output_schema.description: Path to the canonical findings schema the adapter emits, relative to the repo root (e.g., findings/schemas/junit-xml.schema.json), or null when the action does not produce structured findings.

required_evidence.description: Artifact types the adapter must produce. Each entry is a short identifier (kebab-case).

conformance_suite.description: Identifier of the conformance suite that tests this contract. Pattern: <namespace>.<action>-suite.
